title: Portfolio Website
description: Showcasing selected works in web development, UI/UX design, and software engineering. Built with React 19, TailwindCSS 4, integrating Three.js and Framer Motion for 3D backgrounds and smooth animations. Optimized for SEO, responsive design, dark/light mode.

title: Rich Gardiner - Corporate Website
description: A sleek corporate site for fractional CMO services, offering strategic marketing leadership and scalable growth plans. Built with WordPress for content flexibility and professional branding.

title: Green-Acres - Multinational Real Estate Website
description: Fine-tuned an LLM on proprietary healthcare data to classify patient intake forms and route them to the correct department automatically. Worked with a US-based healthcare startup to reduce manual classification time and improve routing accuracy to over 92%.

title: LLM Fine-Tuning for Healthcare Data Classification
description: Premium Organic Food E-commerce Platform with comprehensive features including product browsing, shopping cart, JWT-secured authentication, admin dashboard for customers, orders, inventory, and analytics. Integrated with Cloudinary for image management.

title: Luxalgo - E-commerce project
description: Modern eCommerce web application for a leading financial analysis tools company

title: CodigosDTC - Web App
description: A fast, SEO-optimized platform for decoding automotive fault codes in Spanish built with Node.js, React, PostgreSQL

title: RAG Architecture of question-answering (QA) system
description: This diagram illustrates an advanced Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system for intelligent question answering. A user query is constructed and translated (Text-to-SQL, Text-to-Cypher, self-query retrieval), then routed to relational, graph, or vector databases. Retrieved documents are ranked, refined, and re-retrieved if needed. Optimized indexing and embeddings improve search quality. Finally, an LLM generates accurate, context-aware answers using retrieved evidence.

title: Rav AI
description: ​Rav.ai is an AI-powered video editing platform that enables users to create professional-quality videos effortlessly. It offers features like lifelike avatars with customized voices and visuals, automated editing with scene recognition, and tools for creating engaging presentations and social media content. Users can upload raw footage, select templates, add notes, and receive polished videos ready for sharing. Rav.ai supports various use cases, including drone footage editing, thank-you videos, and more, catering to content creators and businesses alike.

title: Takeboost
description: This AI-first accounting ledger is a sophisticated AI app designed to automate complex financial workflows. Built by me, a Full Stack Developer using Node.js, Python, and React, the platform features custom AI Agent Development to handle automated transaction tagging and anomaly detection. By leveraging n8n and Zapier for deep integration, the system creates a self-reconciling ledger that eliminates manual data entry. It’s a modern solution for real-time financial clarity, blending robust engineering with intelligent automation.

title: AI-Powered Recipe Generator
description: This project collects user dietary preferences and generates full recipes with AI. This includes recipe details (Gemini) and both cover and instruction images (Flux-fast). In just seconds, users can get generate and save personalized recipes to make at home.
